# get_project query

## 001_select_projects.sql

### SQLの概要

Project詳細レスポンスを組み立てるため、Projectと関連metadataを取得する。

### 利用するテーブル

- `projects`
- `project_api_keys`
- `project_usage_plans`
- `project_cognito_clients`
- `project_cognito_client_urls`
- `project_members`

### 引数

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `actor_principal_id` | `str` | no |
| `project_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `is_hub_admin` | `Any` | no |

### 戻り値

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `project_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `project_code` | `str` | no |
| `name` | `str` | no |
| `description` | `str` | no |
| `owner_principal_id` | `str` | no |
| `department_code` | `str` | no |
| `apigw_api_key_id` | `str` | no |
| `api_key_last4` | `str` | no |
| `observed_enabled` | `bool` | no |
| `apigw_usage_plan_id` | `str` | no |
| `default_rate_limit` | `int | None` | yes |
| `default_burst_limit` | `int | None` | yes |
| `default_quota_limit` | `int | None` | yes |
| `default_quota_period` | `str | None` | yes |
| `client_type` | `str` | no |
| `app_client_id` | `str` | no |
| `has_client_secret` | `Any` | no |
| `access_token_validity` | `int` | no |
| `access_token_unit` | `str` | no |
| `refresh_token_rotation_enabled` | `bool` | no |
| `url_type` | `str` | no |
| `url` | `str` | no |

### 条件

- `JOIN ON k.project_id = p.project_id`
- `JOIN ON up.project_id = p.project_id`
- `JOIN ON c.project_id = p.project_id`
- `JOIN ON u.project_cognito_client_id = c.project_cognito_client_id`
- `JOIN ON pm.project_id = p.project_id AND pm.member_principal_id = @actor_principal_id`
- `WHERE p.project_id = @project_id AND (p.owner_principal_id = @actor_principal_id OR NOT pm.project_member_id IS NULL OR @is_hub_admin = TRUE)`
